projects.name: 01-Screen Automate
projects.description:
yarn dev
# or
pnpm dev
# or
bun dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) with your browser to see the result.

You can start editing the page by modifying `app/page.tsx`. The page auto-updates as you edit the file.

This project uses [`next/font`](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/optimizing/fonts) to automatically optimize and load [Geist](https://vercel.com/font), a new font family for Vercel.

recent_commits.message: feat(ocr): remove spaces between Chinese characters for better matching accuracy
Docs: Add session memory for March 15 and initialize Issues Log with RCA.
Major Refactor: Replace Tesseract with Windows.Media.Ocr & UI Enhancements suite. Fixed UI deadlock, added variable/history panels, and upgraded project target frameworks.
Enhance Export: Single-file EXE support, embedded AWS package, fixed image path resolution, added Runner log export, and fixed magnifier crosshair offset
feat: implement multi-condition IfAction with boolean expression support
chore: remove legacy Next.js/React and Tauri frontend files
Initial commit from Create Next App

projects.name: 02-openclaw_manage_tools
projects.description:
This template provides a minimal setup to get React working in Vite with HMR and some ESLint rules.

Currently, two official plugins are available:

- [@vitejs/plugin-react](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react/blob/main/packages/plugin-react) uses [Babel](https://babeljs.io/) (or [oxc](https://oxc.rs) when used in [rolldown-vite](https://vite.dev/guide/rolldown)) for Fast Refresh
- [@vitejs/plugin-react-swc](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react/blob/main/packages/plugin-react-swc) uses [SWC](https://swc.rs/) for Fast Refresh
